ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., puzzle, adventure, multiplayer) */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players who have played the game */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the game was last updated */,
  "is_multiplayer" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game is multiplayer */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the game (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the developer */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the developer was founded */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games developed by the developer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the developer's games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game element */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the element belongs to */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element (e.g., C_ghost, B_helpbunny) */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of the element (e.g., character, object) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  "is_interactive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the element is interactive */,
  "is_collectible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the element is collectible */,
  "points_value" INTEGER /* Points value associated with the element */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the element was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_elements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game where the interaction occurred */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game element involved in the interaction */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the interaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., drag, click) */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the action (e.g., score change) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in milliseconds */,
  "interaction_location_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the interaction */,
  "interaction_location_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the interaction */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the interaction was successful */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., single, multi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES game_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "is_subscriber" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a subscriber */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the round belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the round start */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the round end */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the round */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the round */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the round was completed */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the round in seconds */,
  "number_of_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made to complete the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game played in the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session start */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session end */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played in the session */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used to play the session (e.g., PC, mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., single, multi) */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "preferred_elements" TEXT /* Preferred game elements (e.g., characters, objects) */,
  "sound_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether sound is enabled */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether notifications are enabled */,
  "preferred_platform" TEXT /* Preferred platform (e.g., PC, mobile) */,
  "preferred_difficulty" TEXT /* Preferred difficulty level */,
  "preferred_game_mode" TEXT /* Preferred game mode (e.g., single, multi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review received */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Developer's reply to the review */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who achieved the milestone */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the achievement is related to */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date the achievement was achieved */,
  "achievement_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the achievement */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the achievement */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the achievement is hidden */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
